description:
You are an order clerk at a wholesale technology distribution company. A deal with TechFlow Solutions has been finalized, and you need to create an invoice in SuiteCRM to track the receivable.

Create a new Invoice with the following details:

- Title: INV-2025-TFS-001
- Account: TechFlow Solutions
- Invoice Date: 01/15/2025
- Due Date: 02/14/2025
- Status: Unpaid
- Billing Address: 500 Technology Drive, San Jose, CA 95110, United States

Line Items:
1. Enterprise CRM License (Qty: 10, Unit Price: 200.00)
2. Implementation Services (Qty: 20, Unit Price: 150.00)
3. Annual Support Package (Qty: 1, Unit Price: 1500.00)

Save the record.
